purpose: Free/no-key API source registry for the SignalDaily daily Markdown generator.

policy.financial_advice: Educational market monitoring only. Do not generate buy/sell/hold recommendations.
policy.source_priority: Prefer official and primary sources when available. Use community/news APIs as discovery signals, not final proof.
policy.failure_mode: Fail soft: generate the daily brief even if one or more APIs fail. Log failures in Automation Notes.

sources.name: Hacker News Algolia - AI signals

queries.query: AI OR agents OR LLM OR OpenAI OR Claude OR Gemini
developer tools OR GitHub OR coding agent OR IDE OR framework

sources.notes: No key required. Community attention signal only.

sources.name: arXiv AI research feed
sources.query: cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.SE
sources.notes: No key required. Recent AI/ML/NLP/software-engineering research discovery.

sources.name: GitHub new AI repositories
sources.notes: Uses the GitHub Actions GITHUB_TOKEN automatically when available.

sources.name: GDELT news discovery

queries.query: (OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Gemini OR artificial intelligence OR AI model)
(Sri Lanka OR Colombo Stock Exchange OR CSE OR CBSL OR LKR)
(global markets OR Federal Reserve OR inflation OR oil prices OR gold prices OR technology stocks)

sources.notes: No key required. Treat as discovery; verify high-impact claims.

sources.name: Open exchange-rate snapshot
sources.notes: No key required open endpoint. FX context only, not trading advice.

sources.name: CoinGecko crypto snapshot
sources.notes: Free crypto price context. May be rate limited.
